settings.editor: Before joining our party tour read our disclaimer

settings.title: WHAT IS IN IT FOR YOU?
All our Pub Crawl Barcelona includes:
All our Party Night Barcelona includes:

settings.text: I'M NOT BORING, I WANNA PARTY

settings.editor:
Flying solo or looking to find your crew? Our Barcelona Night Experience is the ultimate ice-breaker—all about meeting new people and exploring different venues.

Quick heads-up: This is a social crawl, NOT a 'get wasted' tour. We're here for good vibes and making connections, not blackouts. If your only goal is to get drunk, this is NOT the tour for you. Let's have an epic night and keep it respectful!

settings.title: WHAT IS OUR PLAN FOR YOU?

bwdtl_timeline_content_box.bwdtl_TL_desc:
At 22:30, meet us at our meeting point — the heart of all the fun.
That’s where we bring the crew together, crack a few jokes, hand out a free gift, and kick things off with some easygoing social games to get everyone ready for an unforgettable night.

Time to leave the meeting point behind and kick off the crawl!
By now, you’re warmed up, the energy’s flowing, and you’re ready for our second stop — where a little surprise is waiting for you.
Step into the buzzing nightlife, enjoy the music, meet new friends, and soak up the atmosphere as the adventure continues.

bwdtl_timeline_content_box.bwdtl_TL_title: IT'S NOT A SPRINT, IT'S A MARATHON
bwdtl_timeline_content_box.bwdtl_TL_desc:
You’re on a roll tonight! Time to switch things up and keep the good vibes going.
We’re heading to our next spot and, before you know it, there’s another little surprise waiting for you — just because we can.

The last stop was a blast — sharing gifts with new friends, maybe showing off your Macarena moves, and creating moments you’ll want to remember.
Now we’re off to the nightclub, ready to show Barcelona how it’s done!
VIP treatment? Absolutely — your name’s on the list! Let’s make this night one to remember.

settings.title: RULES OF OUR PUB CRAWL BARCELONA

icon_list.text: Don't forget your ID! Bring something legit like a passport, driver's license, or ID card. No photocopies, please!
Dress code: Keep it casual, but leave out the gym shorts, sleeveless shirts for guys, flip-flops, sandals, sweatpants, and track pants.
Respect your fellow crawlers and our amazing staff

settings.editor:
Barcelona Pub Crawl by KING — where your Barcelona nightlife adventure begins!
Ready to dive into the city’s coolest evening scene?

Skip the ordinary — our legendary Party Tour Barcelona is all about great venues, amazing energy, and unforgettable moments every single night. From the moment you join, you’re part of the crew, exploring the city’s best bars, clubs, and hidden gems together.

We’re not just another party tour — we’re your guide to Barcelona’s top nightlife spots, with the perfect mix of music, social games, surprises, and good company. Want to explore more? Check out our popular Free Walking Tour Barcelona for a daytime adventure to match your night out.

Join the friendliest crowd in town and make your night one to remember with Barcelona Pub Crawl by KING.

settings.title: PARTNERS OF OUR PUB CRAWL BARCELONA

settings.description: Join your fellow backpackers in a crazy night

settings.title: PRIVATE PARTY TOUR
settings.description:
Embark on an exclusive adventure through
Barcelona's vibrant nightlife, tailor-made
just for you and your squad!

settings.title: WHY WILL YOU CHOOSE OUR PARTY TOUR BARCELONA?

settings.editor:
First off, our Bar Crawl Barcelona is your ticket to discovering some of the most unique and vibrant bars, pubs, and clubs in the city.

Our friendly local guides will take you through Barcelona’s liveliest neighborhoods, showing you the best spots to enjoy music, dance, and great conversations with locals and fellow travelers.

And speaking of meeting people — our Bar Hopping Barcelona nights are perfect for making new friends from all over the world. Expect plenty of laughs, shared moments, and memories you’ll carry long after the night ends.

Now for the perks — our Party tour Barcelona is like a VIP pass to a stress-free, budget-friendly night out. Enjoy fun surprises at every stop, skip-the-line entry to top clubs, and exclusive deals to make your night even better.

Barcelona Pub Crawl by KING is the ultimate way to experience the city’s nightlife, connect with amazing people, and have an unforgettable evening in one of the most exciting cities in the world.
